name: bigvalue-realestate
description: Build residential real-estate services on BigValue Data Marketplace: codegen skill (complex search, map markers, price panels, dong/ho drilldown) plus MCP tools for product contracts, recipes, templates, and live data.

mcp_url.title: Data Marketplace MCP URL
mcp_url.description: MCP server URL provided during onboarding (e.g. https://<host>/mcp)

api_key.title: Data Marketplace API Key
api_key.description: API key provided during onboarding. Stored securely; sent only as a Bearer header to the MCP server.
